triggers.entry: Start of battle, returns after Element Discharge

normal.counter: Use Speed to counter Technical dragon attacks. Power for aerial Speed dives

attacks.name: Elemental Horn
attacks.description: Charged horn attack with dragon element

normal.notes: Unpredictable elemental shifts coming - prepare for Fire or Ice mode

fire_mode.name: Fire Active
fire_mode.pattern: Aggressive fire-based Power attacks with Technical elemental bursts. High damage, vulnerable to Ice element.

triggers.entry: Random element shift from Normal, or forced by Thunder/Water damage
triggers.exit: After 4-5 turns OR when Ice element damage threshold reached

fire_mode.counter: Use ICE ELEMENT attacks to force out of this mode. Technical counters Power charges

attacks.name: Flame Charge
attacks.description: Devastating charging attack wreathed in fire

fire_mode.notes: CRITICAL: Use Ice element to break this mode! Physical attacks do reduced damage

ice_mode.name: Ice Active
ice_mode.pattern: Precise Technical ice attacks with Speed follow-ups. Freezing effects, vulnerable to Fire element.

triggers.entry: Random element shift from Normal, or forced by Fire/Dragon damage
triggers.exit: After 4-5 turns OR when Fire element damage threshold reached

ice_mode.counter: Use FIRE ELEMENT attacks to force out of this mode. Speed counters Technical ice strikes

attacks.name: Blizzard Beam
attacks.description: Piercing ice laser that can freeze

ice_mode.notes: CRITICAL: Use Fire element to break this mode! Beware freezing effects

escaton_phase.name: Escaton Judgment
escaton_phase.pattern: Preparation for ultimate attack. Massive Technical elemental buildup with devastating Power finisher.

triggers.entry: After cycling through Fire/Ice modes, or when health drops below 30%
